item.title: America 250 Ultimate Picnic Photo Challenge
item.description:
Wednesday, July 1, 2026 at 10 AM

Location: Galveston Island State Park

Join a coast‑to‑coast celebration of outdoor traditions with one simple snapshot.🎉

item.description:
Thursday, July 2, 2026 at 7:45 PM

Location: Galveston Island State Park

From Texas Parks and Wildlife Houston Events

item.title: America 250 - Iron Inks and Feather Pens!
item.description:
Friday, July 3, 2026 at 10 AM

Location: Mission Tejas State Park

Commemorate America's 250th Anniversary by writing with the same kind of ink and pen that the Founding Fathers used to create the Declaration of Independence and the US Constitution!

From Texas Parks and Wildlife Houston Events

item.title: Pelts and Tracks
item.description:
Friday, July 3, 2026 at 2 PM

Location: Martin Dies, Jr. State Park

item.description:
Friday, July 3, 2026 at 8:30 PM

Location: Martin Dies, Jr. State Park

From Texas Parks and Wildlife Houston Events

item.title: Red, White, and Blue Birding Walk
item.description:
Saturday, July 4, 2026 at 9 AM

Location: Village Creek State Park

In honor of the USA's 250th, join a Park Ranger to learn about birding and see how many red, white, or blue birds we can find along the way.

From Texas Parks and Wildlife Houston Events

item.title: Red White and Bluegill Family Fishing Event
item.description:
Saturday, July 4, 2026 at 9 AM

Location: Huntsville State Park

Celebrate Independence Day participating in one of this country’s oldest outdoor activities.

item.title: Sea Center Shark Celebration
item.description:
Saturday, July 18, 2026 at 11 AM

Location: Sea Center Texas

See and touch real shark specimens; chat with shark experts; participate in a Shark Scavenger Hunt (prizes for the first 100 winners); search for shark teeth in the sand pit; get your face painted; create a shark-themed craft; purchase snacks from vendors; and more!

From Texas Parks and Wildlife Houston Events

Sunday, July 26, 2026 at 1 PM

Location: Enchanted Rock State Natural Area

What’s that in the distance?! Learn how to use binoculars to find objects near and far with Ranger Hannah.

From Texas Parks and Wildlife Houston Events

item.title: Deer Depot
item.description:
Sunday, July 26, 2026 at 2 PM

Location: Brazos Bend State Park

item.description:

item.description:
Saturday, August 1, 2026 at 8:30 AM
